# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

build_job:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Building application..."
    - mkdir -p artifacts/bin
    - echo "binary_content" > artifacts/bin/app
    - echo "config_content" > artifacts/config.yaml
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - artifacts/
    expire_in: 30 days
  only:
    - main

deploy_job_1:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to environment 1..."
    - ls -la
    - ./artifacts/bin/app
  dependencies:
    - build_job
  only:
    - main

deploy_job_2:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to environment 2..."
    - ls -la
    - ./artifacts/bin/app
  dependencies:
    - build_job
  only:
    - main
